prompt: Create an execution plan from this PRD file: create-plan-workspace/test-prds/small-prd.md

assertions.text: Plan contains all 12 mandatory ExecPlan sections (Purpose, Progress, Surprises & Discoveries, Decision Log, Outcomes & Retrospective, Context, Plan of Work, Concrete Steps, Validation, Idempotence, Artifacts, Interfaces)
Progress section uses checkbox format (- [ ] or - [x])
Plan is self-contained with no external references (no 'see the PRD', 'refer to docs')
Plan uses concrete repository-relative file paths (e.g., src/routes/health.ts)
Plan includes exact runnable shell commands
Validation is phrased as observable behavior (HTTP responses, test output) not internal attributes
Technical terms (Express, Router, pg.Pool, Jest, supertest) are defined in plain language
